request.query:
type:Organization
has:homepageUri
or(
  location.country.name:or("Germany","France","Italy","Netherlands","Switzerland","Sweden","Austria","Spain"),
  locations.country.name:or("Germany","France","Italy","Netherlands","Switzerland","Sweden","Austria","Spain")
)
or(
    description:or("machine vision","industrial vision","visual inspection","optical inspection","automated optical inspection","quality inspection","vision-guided robotics"),
    allDescriptions:or("machine vision","industrial vision","visual inspection","optical inspection","automated optical inspection","quality inspection","vision-guided robotics","industrielle Bildverarbeitung","optische Inspektion")
)
or(
    description:or("system integrator","system integration","turnkey","custom solution","customer-specific","engineering services","commissioning","robot guidance","inspection system","automation solution","inspection solutions","quality control","implementation","project"),
    allDescriptions:or("system integrator","system integration","turnkey","custom solution","customer-specific","engineering services","commissioning","robot guidance","inspection system","automation solution","inspection solutions","quality control","implementation","project","Systemintegration","kundenspezifisch","Automatisierungstechnik","Sondermaschinenbau")
)
not(
  or(
    description:or("face recognition","face tracking","biometrics","virtual try-on","security","smart city","traffic enforcement","marketing research","camera module","smart camera","embedded vision","led lighting","x-ray inspection","distributor","reseller"),
    allDescriptions:or("face recognition","face tracking","biometrics","virtual try-on","security","smart city","traffic enforcement","marketing research","camera module","smart camera","embedded vision","led lighting","x-ray inspection","distributor","reseller")
  )
)
